gist.headline: Bubbling up the best notes
gist.blurb: A new community app called BubbleUp just landed in the greenhouse! It's a neat tool for organizing web highlights, extracting key points, and syncing your notes across devices.
gist.summary: Added BubbleUp to the community apps showcase, a tool for organizing and syncing web highlights and notes.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use BubbleUp from the pollinations.ai app directory to manage their web research.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with floating bubbles that contain notes and highlights, representing the 'BubbleUp' app's note-taking and organizing features.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, organizing glowing floating bubbles that contain tiny pixelated notes and web pages. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
